channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated by Frontion

item.title: 🇨🇳 Macau joins China cross-border digital currency platform as 11 banks sign up
item.description: Macau has joined Project mBridge, a multi-country central bank digital currency settlement platform alongside China, Hong Kong, Thailand, UAE and Saudi Arabia. The move advances Beijing's push to create alternatives to US dollar-centric payment networks amid heightened tensions.

item.title: 🇪🇺 Chinese automaker SAIC to build first EU car plant in Spain
item.description: SAIC Motor plans to establish its first European Union production facility in Spain's Galicia region with a €200 million initial investment. The MG brand owner aims to start construction in 2027 and begin operations by 2028, creating approximately 1,000 direct jobs.

item.title: 🇩🇰 Denmark's Frederiksen secures third term amid Greenland tensions with Trump
item.description: Danish PM Mette Frederiksen formed a center-left minority coalition government after more than two months of negotiations following March elections. She maintains power during a diplomatic crisis with the US over the future of Greenland.

item.title: 🚢 China advances fourth aircraft carrier as powers invest despite drone threat
item.description: Satellite images show China's fourth aircraft carrier, the nuclear-powered Type 004, taking shape at Dalian shipyard with electromagnetic catapults. Despite growing drone and submarine threats to large surface vessels, major powers including France, Turkey, India and Japan continue investing in carriers as symbols of military might.

item.title: 🤖 AI and robotics shift Ukraine toward victory prospects, analysts say
item.description: European officials increasingly see Ukraine as potentially on a path to victory, crediting advances in AI-guided drones and ground robots that can hold territory. Ukraine has developed systems like the TFL-1 autonomous targeting module, achieving interception rates around 90% against Russian attacks.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia launches massive strikes across Ukraine killing at least nine
item.description: Ballistic missiles and drones hit Kyiv and Dnipro, destroying apartment buildings. Moscow warned of systematic strikes after a drone attack in Luhansk killed 21.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah agrees to halt attacks on Israel in US-brokered deal
item.description: Lebanon confirmed Hezbollah accepted a mutual cessation of attacks, but Israel said it would continue operations in southern Lebanon. Iran warned violations would breach the US-Iran ceasefire.

item.title: ⛪ Pope Leo XIV makes historic apology for Vatican role in slavery
item.description: First US-born pope issued encyclical acknowledging papal bulls that legitimized slavery for centuries. Called it a wound in Christian memory.

item.title: 💰 Bond market sends inflation warning to Trump ahead of midterms
item.description: Rising Treasury yields driven by deficit concerns and Iran war costs are pushing mortgage rates to 9-month highs, creating economic vulnerability for Republicans.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Trump berates Netanyahu over Lebanon strikes in heated call
item.description: US president reportedly told Israeli PM everyone hates Israel over its bombardment of Lebanon. Hezbollah agreed to halt attacks after the call.

item.title: ⛽ Goldman Sachs Warns Fuel Margins to Stay Elevated Through 2026
item.description: Refined fuel margins will remain sharply elevated through 2026 due to Strait of Hormuz disruptions tightening product markets more than crude, Goldman Sachs said in a research note. The analysis highlights lasting impacts from Middle East conflict on global energy markets.

item.title: 🇳🇴 Norway Oil Workers Threaten Strike from June 5
item.description: Nearly 8% of Norwegian offshore oil and gas workers plan to strike from June 5 if state-brokered wage mediation fails, labor union data showed. The action could impact output from Western Europe's top oil and gas producer.

item.title: 🇰🇷 Kakao Union Announces June 10 Strike Over Job Security
item.description: South Korea's Kakao Corp union will stage a four-hour strike on June 10 seeking job security amid restructuring concerns. The action threatens service disruptions for KakaoTalk, South Korea's dominant messaging platform with 45 million users.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Massive Russian missile and drone attack on Kyiv kills 6, injures 55
item.description: Russia launched a large-scale aerial attack against Ukraine overnight, targeting Kyiv with missiles and drones. Residential buildings were damaged in Kyiv and Dnipro as air defenses engaged multiple threats.

item.title: ⚔️ Hegseth vows Supreme Court appeal after transgender military ban ruling
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth indicated he will take the transgender troops ban case to the Supreme Court after a federal appeals court ruled the Trump administration illegally banned active transgender service members.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Two dead in Taiwan military training plane crash at Kaohsiung air base
item.description: A T-34 military training plane crashed at Gangshan Air Base in Kaohsiung, killing two personnel. The incident comes amid heightened regional tensions and increased military activity around Taiwan.

item.title: 🇫🇷🇷🇺 French Navy Intercepts Russian Shadow Fleet Tanker in Atlantic
item.description: France boarded a sanctioned tanker linked to Russian oil trade and redirected it to French territory. Russia condemned the move as "international piracy" amid ongoing tensions over sanctions enforcement.

item.title: 🇱🇧🇮🇱🇺🇳 UN Security Council Demands Israeli Withdrawal From Southern Lebanon
item.description: Council members called for Israel to pull out of southern Lebanon after Israel threatened to attack southern Beirut. Trump announced a limited ceasefire between Hezbollah and Israel.

item.title: 🇺🇦⚔️ Russian Airstrikes Kill Five in Major Attack Across Ukraine
item.description: Russian missile and drone attacks on Kyiv, Dnipro, and Kharkiv killed at least five and wounded dozens. The assault followed days of warnings about a planned major offensive.

item.title: 🇺🇦🤝 Zelenskiy Aide Sees Realistic Chance of Peace Deal by Winter
item.description: Chief of staff Kyrylo Budanov said a winter peace deal is realistic as peace talks continue. Ukraine has stepped up attacks on Russian energy facilities amid stalled negotiations.

item.title: 🇹🇼🇺🇸 Taiwan Opposition Leader Seeks Trump Meeting on US Visit
item.description: KMT leader Cheng Li-wun said she would be "very willing" to meet Trump during her US trip this month, amid scrutiny of her party defense policy positions.

item.title: ⚖️🇺🇸 Appeals Court Rules Trump Policy Illegally Banned Transgender Troops
item.description: A federal appeals court found that the Trump administration illegally banned transgender people from serving in the military, ruling the policy discriminatory.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungarian PM Threatens to Remove Orbán-Era President
item.description: Péter Magyar pledged to remove President Tamás Sulyok after his landslide election victory. The stand-off creates a constitutional clash with remnants of Viktor Orbán's regime.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia loses more territory than it gained in May for first time since 2023
item.description: Ukrainian monitoring group DeepState reports Russia's territorial gains turned negative in May as Ukraine recaptured more ground than Russia occupied. This comes despite a 37.5% increase in Russian assault actions during the month.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil prices fall as Middle East tensions ease after Trump remarks
item.description: Brent crude dropped below per barrel and WTI fell to .9 as energy markets responded to signs of de-escalation in the Middle East conflict following Trump's comments on Lebanon.
